texts: Added a community rating tab on identity and E.G.O pages. Users can submit ratings based on a number of criteria and optionally include a review. Ratings are averaged to form the community rating, while reviews can be viewed by clicking a button on the tab.

Added a Community Ranking page which displays all the identities and E.G.Os ranked according to the ratings given to them. They can be ranked based on each individual criteria or using the overall ranking. Filters are also available to get rankings for a subset of identities or E.G.Os.
Small text hints have been added to guide people to use Advanced Compare Mode in the Identities and E.G.Os pages and Display Type in Team Builds.
The About page has been updated with a few links.
